text: - **Trellis trace-tooling cluster (very active right now):** #141 (versioned data scripts/trace files — closed #114), #83 ("Add transaction trace scenario replay"), #142 ("Build Flight Recorder trace replay demo"), **#160** ("Rebuild Flight Recorder as a trace workstation," merged today) — turned Flight Recorder into a full evidence workstation: provenance, transaction timeline, phase ladder, receipt inspector, replay/raw-trace tabs; explicit about `[BUNDLED FIXTURE]` vs `[LIVE UNAVAILABLE]` (no live WASM engine wired yet). This is functionally a time-travel/trace-replay UI already shipping under epic #87, distinct from and not yet connected to NMP's proposed nmp-devtools MCP surface (#2809) or chirp's X-Ray pane (#30). Closest existing artifact to "time-travel tooling."
